debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih :
  (List.map reverse xs.reverse.tails).reverse =
    List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
      (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
        (Chapter3.SymList.nil a) xs)
⊢ List.map reverse (xs.reverse ++ [x]).tails =
    (List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
          (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
            (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a x (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)) xs)).reverse ++
      [Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)]

proof:
have h : ∀ (ys : List a) (sl1 sl2 : SymList a),
      SymList.fromSL sl1 = x :: SymList.fromSL sl2 →
      List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) sl1 ys) =
      List.map (List.cons x) (List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) sl2 ys)) := by
      intro ys
      induction ys with
      | nil => intro sl1 sl2 heq; simp [heq]
      | cons z zs ih' =>
        intro sl1 sl2 heq
        rw [scanl_cons, scanl_cons, List.map, List.map, flip, flip, heq]
        congr 1
        apply ih'
        rw [fromSL_snoc, fromSL_snoc, heq]
        simp
    rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append, List.map_map]
    rw [h xs (SymList.snocSL x SymList.nil) SymList.nil (by rw [fromSL_snoc]; simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil])]
    rw [← map_reverse, ← ih, List.reverse_reverse]
    simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, List.reverse_append, List.map_map, Function.comp]
successful_attempts:
have h : ∀ (ys : List a) (sl1 sl2 : SymList a),
      SymList.fromSL sl1 = x :: SymList.fromSL sl2 →
      List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) sl1 ys) =
      List.map (List.cons x) (List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) sl2 ys)) := by
      intro ys
      induction ys with
      | nil => intro sl1 sl2 heq; simp [heq]
      | cons z zs ih' =>
        intro sl1 sl2 heq
        rw [scanl_cons, scanl_cons, List.map, List.map, flip, flip, heq]
        congr 1
        apply ih'
        rw [fromSL_snoc, fromSL_snoc, heq]
        simp
    rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append, List.map_map]
    rw [h xs (SymList.snocSL x SymList.nil) SymList.nil (by rw [fromSL_snoc]; simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil])]
    rw [← map_reverse, ← ih, List.reverse_reverse]
    simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, List.reverse_append, List.map_map, Function.comp]
